series_metadata.series_title: Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery Plans
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the protection and reestablishment of data processing services, equipment and data (back-up files) in case of a disaster.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded by revised plan then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until superseded by revised plan then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
